name: OWASP_A10_SSRF_Attack_Detection
search: index="web_logs" | search uri="*url=*" OR uri="*dest=*" OR uri="*path=*" OR uri="*uri=*" OR uri="*proxy=*" | search uri="*127.0.0.1*" OR uri="*localhost*" OR uri="*169.254.169.254*" OR uri="*metadata*" OR uri="*file://*" OR uri="*gopher://*" OR uri="*dict://*" | iplocation clientip | fillnull value="Unknown" Country, City | eval OWASP_Category="A10:2021-SSRF", Alert="SSRF Cəhdi Aşkarlandı" | eval son_gorulme = strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort - son_gorulme | table son_gorulme, clientip, Country, City, uri, OWASP_Category, Alert
description: Serverin daxili resurslarına (localhost, metadata) və ya qeyri-adi protokollara (file, gopher) müraciət edərək edilən SSRF cəhdlərini aşkarlayır.
